urbanize.name: Urbanise
urbanize.description: Zone and develop this area for urban use. Increases tile capacity but adds climate pressure.

restoreHabitat.name: Restore Habitat
restoreHabitat.description: Ecological restoration of a climate or industrially damaged tile. Clears dustbowl or irradiated status and regenerates natural cover.

cleanIndustrialSite.name: Clean Industrial Site
cleanIndustrialSite.description: Decontamination and remediation of an irradiated industrial site. Returns the tile to usable condition.

buildSeaWall.name: Build Sea Wall
buildSeaWall.description: Construct coastal flood defences. Protected tiles cannot be inundated by sea level rise.
